mapper.select: SELECT * FROM plan_group WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND (user_id IS NULL OR user_id = #{userId}) ORDER BY sort_weight DESC, id ASC
SELECT * FROM plan_group WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO plan_group (user_id, name, sort_weight) VALUES (#{userId}, #{name}, #{sortWeight})
mapper.update: UPDATE plan_group SET name = #{name}, sort_weight = #{sortWeight} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE plan_group SET is_deleted = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
